expectations.text: Does the output include the 'TARGET: [Project Name] - RECOMMENDED DESIGN SYSTEM' block?
expectations.evidence: Design system was mentioned in the response but not saved to a file or included in index.html.

expectations.text: Does the implementation include accessibility features (e.g., focus states, aria labels)?
expectations.evidence: Uses semantic HTML and Outfit font for display.

expectations.text: Is the 'soft UI' style (calming colors, soft shadows) visible?
expectations.evidence: Implements .soft-card with subtle shadows and large border-radius.

expectations.text: Is there a mention or evidence of the Pre-delivery Checklist being run?
expectations.evidence: Checklist was provided in the subagent's response text.
